form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up to post a big 5.5 len win. Fontainebleau on February 26 over 3850m slow track defeating Divilskin carrying 71kg at $4 in a steeplechase. Second-up favourite; won by 0.5 len Compiegne on March 23 over 3900m slow track defeating Kucharsky with 72kg at $3.80 in a steeplechase. Fitter now and making headway every start. Rates highly on recent form and can go on with it.

form.formComment: Useful gelding. Last run pulled up at this track in the LR on March 28 over 3900m. Race before finished third of 12 starters at Compiegne on March 11 over 3800m, 18 len behind Saint Bath carrying 70kg at $2.50. Cannot be ruled in this easier race.

form.formComment: Freshened for 33 days. Last start finished fifth of 12 runners at Compiegne on March 11 over 3800m, 26 len behind Saint Bath with 73kg at $40. Start before pulled up at Fontainebleau on February 26 over 3850m. Rates well. Capable of a better performance.

Start before pulled up at Fontainebleau on February 26 over 3850m. Rates well. Capable of a better performance.

form.formComment: Last outing couldn't go on with it; finished sixth of 11 runners at Nancy on April 4 over 4200m, slow track; 20 len behind Maniysa Bleue carrying 67.5kg at $16. The start before that; pulled up at Fontainebleau on March 9 over 4400m. Forward showing expected. Has ability and rates highly on best form.

form.formComment: Second-up today. First-up after four months eased back early on finished seventh of 13 runners at Compiegne on April 6 over 3800m, slow track; 8 len behind Ioum Rochelais carrying 62kg at $32. Previously second-up fell at Cagnes-sur-Mer on December 8 over 3400m. Definite chance. Worth including.

form.formComment: Resumes off a 29 day letup. Last outing finished sixth of 9 starters at Lyon-Parilly on March 15 over 4100m, 15 len behind Bubble Pretty with 71kg at $3.80. Start before finished fourth of 13 runners at this track on March 1 over 4400m, 6 len behind King S Boum carrying 70.5kg at $18. Big task ahead.

form.formComment: Resumes off a 36 day letup. Last start pulled up at Saumur on March 8 over 4500m. Before that finished third of 8 runners at Maure-de-Bretagne on February 22 over 4200m, on heavy track; 7 len behind Aleoppe Pelem with 68kg. Expect he will not threaten.

Before that finished third of 8 runners at Maure-de-Bretagne on February 22 over 4200m, on heavy track; 7 len behind Aleoppe Pelem with 68kg. Expect he will not threaten.

form.formComment: Resumes off a 46 day letup. Last outing ran on from midfield; finished third of 9 starters at Fontainebleau on February 26 over 3850m, on slow going 5.5 len behind Fidele Au Poste carrying 66kg at $11. The start before that; finished fifth of 9 starters at Pau on January 11 over 4700m, in the wet; 13 len behind Karnaval Point with 68kg at $26. Sure to improve again. Should run well again.

form.formComment: Last outing came from midfield; finished seventh of 8 runners at Montlucon-Neris on April 5 over 3500m, 12 len behind Emir Chop carrying 66kg. The start before that; pulled up at this track on March 1 over 3600m. Hard to have on current form.
